details.reasoning: Complete implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) Stats variant and StatsArgs struct with human flag added to CacheCommand enum; (2) Command implementation correctly iterates CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage to compute disk sizes; (3) Function is pub(crate) fn cache_stats returning ExitStatus::Success; (4) --human flag implemented with aliases (-H, --human-readable) using human_readable_bytes for formatting; (5) Output includes per-bucket lines with user-facing names and directory names, separator line, and grand total; (6) Proper module registration with mod cache_stats and pub(crate) use in mod.rs; (7) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs correctly matches CacheCommand::Stats and calls cache_stats; (8) Code follows same patterns as cache_size command. Additional strengths: preview feature flag added defensively, handles edge case of missing cache root, proper column alignment in output.
